script:
set -e; echo '===== STEP 1: get appcatalog token =====' && TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh); echo "  token-len=${#TOKEN}"; echo; echo '===== STEP 2: build v1.2 zip with rename =====' && SRC=/home/azureuser/aixa-teams-app/aixa-teams-app.zip; DST=/home/azureuser/aixa-teams-app/aixa-teams-app-v1.2.zip; WORK=$(mktemp -d); cp $SRC $WORK/orig.zip; cd $WORK; unzip -q orig.zip; python3 -c "import json; m=json.load(open('manifest.json')); m['name']['short']='Aixa Claude'; m['version']='1.2.0'; json.dump(m, open('manifest.json','w'), indent=2)"; rm -f $DST; zip -q $DST manifest.json color.png outline.png; echo "  built: $DST ($(stat -c '%s' $DST) bytes)"; echo "  manifest after edit:"; unzip -p $DST manifest.json | jq '{version, name: .name, scopes: .bots[0].scopes}'; echo; echo '===== STEP 3: upload as new appDefinition =====' && APP_ID=05db4e89-bf71-4f52-b8b3-67f859a44c1b; RESP=$(curl -sS -w "
__HTTP__:%{http_code}" -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$APP_ID/appDefinitions?requiresReview=false" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/zip" --data-binary @$DST); echo "$RESP" | tail -20; CODE=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); echo "  http_code=$CODE"; if [ "$CODE" != "200" ] && [ "$CODE" != "201" ]; then echo "UPLOAD FAILED — stopping before systemd changes" >&2; exit 1; fi; echo; echo '===== STEP 4: systemd drop-in for env var =====' && for svc in aixa-bot aixa-responder; do sudo mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d; printf '[Service]
Environment="AIXA_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID=%s"
' "$APP_ID" | sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d/catalog-id.conf >/dev/null; echo "  wrote /etc/systemd/system/$svc.service.d/catalog-id.conf"; done; sudo systemctl daemon-reload; echo; echo '===== STEP 5: restart + verify =====' && sudo systemctl restart aixa-bot.service aixa-responder.service; sleep 2; systemctl is-active aixa-bot.service aixa-responder.service; echo; echo 'env after restart:'; systemctl show aixa-responder.service -p Environment --value; rm -rf $WORK; echo; echo 'DONE'
